arts.ttl: Sarina Wiegman: Chloe Kelly and Beth Mead will add quality for England
arts.sum: Wiegman has named both wingers in her latest squad announcement for the Nations League double-header against Belgium in April.

arts.ttl: Experienced pair recalled to latest England Women squad after injuries
arts.sum: England Women are back in action in April in a UEFA Nations a double header against Belgium, with Sarina Wiegman naming a 25-player squad for the second international break of 2025.
